hypothesis:
## Novel Hypothesis

Incorporating multi-scale physics constraints that account for interfacial interactions between composite phases (e.g., fiber-matrix adhesion strength, filler dispersion uniformity) into the diffusion process will enable PCDiff to generate composites with superior mechanical-thermal property trade-offs compared to models constrained only by compositional sum rules, as interfacial phenomena dominate failure modes and transport properties in heterogeneous composites beyond what bulk composition alone can predict.
